prompt: Generate a 3D render in the clean, stylized aesthetic of image 2. Feature a character resembling the one from image 1, interacting with a monitor displaying 3D software elements, similar to the desk setup shown in image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a 3D render in the clean, stylized aesthetic of image 2. The scene should feature a yellow, cylindrical character with large goggle-like eyes and denim overalls, reminiscent of the character from image 1. This character is seated at a light-colored, rounded desk, similar to the setup in image 2, and appears to be typing on a keyboard. A large monitor, similar in style to the one in image 2, is centrally positioned on the desk, displaying a user interface with elements typical of 3D software, such as a viewport, toolbars, and property panels. A small potted plant and a mug should also be visible on the desk.
objects: Yellow, cylindrical character with large goggle-like eyes and denim overalls
Large monitor, centrally positioned on the desk
User interface on monitor with 3D software elements (viewport, toolbars, property panels)
Small potted plant on the desk
